ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "density" TEXT /* Density of the device (e.g., 256 Mbit, 512 Mbit) */,
  "bank_count" INTEGER /* Number of banks in the device */,
  "row_count" INTEGER /* Number of rows in the device */,
  "row_size" INTEGER /* Size of each row in bits */,
  "row_cycle_time" REAL /* Time for a row cycle in nanoseconds */,
  "refresh_cycle_time" REAL /* Time for a refresh cycle in nanoseconds */,
  "device_category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the device */,
  "manufacturing_process" TEXT /* Manufacturing process used for the device */,
  "operating_temperature_range" TEXT /* Operating temperature range for the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_density FOREIGN KEY ("density") REFERENCES densities ("density_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_row_cycle_time FOREIGN KEY ("row_cycle_time") REFERENCES cycle_times ("cycle_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_bank_count FOREIGN KEY ("bank_count") REFERENCES bank_counts ("bank_count_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_device_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_category_id") REFERENCES device_categories ("device_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_row_size FOREIGN KEY ("row_size") REFERENCES row_sizes ("row_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_row_count FOREIGN KEY ("row_count") REFERENCES row_counts ("row_count_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "densities" (
  "density_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each density */,
  "density" TEXT /* Density value (e.g., 256 Mbit, 512 Mbit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("density_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bank_counts" (
  "bank_count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bank count */,
  "bank_count" INTEGER /* Number of banks (e.g., 4, 8) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bank_count_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "row_counts" (
  "row_count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each row count */,
  "row_count" INTEGER /* Number of rows (e.g., 8192, 16384) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("row_count_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "row_sizes" (
  "row_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each row size */,
  "row_size" INTEGER /* Size of each row in bits (e.g., 8192) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("row_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cycle_times" (
  "cycle_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cycle time */,
  "row_cycle_time" REAL /* Time for a row cycle in nanoseconds */,
  "refresh_cycle_time" REAL /* Time for a refresh cycle in nanoseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cycle_time_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "update_category" TEXT /* Category of the update */,
  "update_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_updates_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the device */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_types" (
  "device_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device type */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_device_types" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "device_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id", "device_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_manufacturers" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id", "manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specifications" (
  "specification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "specification" TEXT /* Specification name */,
  "value" TEXT /* Specification value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specifications_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_categories" (
  "device_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device category */,
  "device_category" TEXT /* Category of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_benchmarks" (
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "benchmark_name" TEXT /* Name of the benchmark */,
  "benchmark_result" TEXT /* Result of the benchmark */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benchmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_benchmarks_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
